1110101101000111 1011101010100100 1 -> sum: 1010010111101100, cout: 1
0110111111111110 1110010100111110 1 -> sum: 0101010100111101, cout: 1
0011010000010101 1101101110000000 1 -> sum: 0000111110010110, cout: 1
0110001110100100 1010101000001101 0 -> sum: 0000110110110001, cout: 1
0001100010101011 1110111010101010 0 -> sum: 0000011101010101, cout: 1
0110011011100111 0100110101100111 1 -> sum: 1011010001001111, cout: 0

1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
